original_prompt: 帮我给这个产品和手臂添加一个场景，无文案
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Subject: [Subject Lock: Wide multi-strand cuff featuring uniform, transparent champagne-hued spherical beads stacked in parallel rows] worn on a graceful female arm.
Environment: A serene, high-end spa or vanity setting bathed in soft, warm morning light. The background features blurred elements of a silk dressing gown, a vintage mirror, and perhaps a vase of soft beige roses.
Lighting: Golden hour sunlight filtering through sheer curtains, creating gentle caustics and highlights on the transparent beads.
Style: Elegant, minimalist lifestyle photography, high-resolution commercial shot, creamy bokeh, luxurious atmosphere.

[Text & UI Layout]
Main Title: "Golden Elegance"
Subtitle: "Pure Champagne Glow"
Slogan: "Timeless Beauty for Every Moment"
Font Style: Thin, elegant serif fonts in gold or dark warm grey, positioned in the negative space (top left or right).
layout_logic: Considering the arm is diagonally placed, there is ample negative space in the top-left or top-right corners. The text should follow the visual flow of the arm but remain unobtrusive. Using a soft, blurred background ensures the detailed texture of the beads pops out as the focal point.
